attacking_style: Launches decisive moves in final 2-5km, particularly on technical transitions (gravel-to-tarmac, descent-to-flat) or short steep gradients. Excels at perfectly-timed uphill sprints from 300-700m, waiting longer than rivals.
team_tactics: Often positioned as opportunistic secondary option rather than protected leader. Team willing to sacrifice his GC position for domestique duties mid-stage. Benefits from TTT dominance to take leadership but rarely holds it long-term.
terrain_preference: Technical finales with short steep ramps (300-700m), wet gravel sectors, and descent-to-sprint transitions. Survives sustained climbs but lacks acceleration when pure climbers attack. Reduced bunch sprints with positioning premium suit him perfectly.
vulnerability: Cracks when pace lifts suddenly inside final 2km on climbs. Poor descending judgment causes dangerous crashes affecting teammates. Struggles to hold solo moves beyond 5km when chasers organize. Weak positioning awareness in technical sections despite experience.
key_patterns: Wins from late breakaways (2-5km) rather than bunch sprints, exploiting technical transitions (4 wins)
Collects bonus seconds aggressively at intermediates when positioned for GC (5+ observations)
Crashes or near-misses in technical sections with 2km remaining, often while defending jersey (4 incidents)
First Grand Tour win at age 30 suggests late-career optimization and evolving role
Exceptional chase ability after mechanicals/punctures to regain front groups in crosswinds (2 observations)
Team frequently rotates leadership away from him despite wearing jersey (3+ races)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Tour breakaway win shows sustained climbing improved, beating companions after 17.5km sustained pressure. Late-career resurgence continuing from 2020 first GT stage win.
